# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: sidecar-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  workloadSelector: {}
  serviceAccount: <your-service-account> # replace with your actual service account
  podDisruptionBudget:
    minAvailable: "85%";
  terminationLogPolicy: ALLOW_ANY;
  telemetryEnabled: true;
  proxyMetadata:
    ISTIO_META_INTERCEPTION_MODE: REGISTRY_ONLY
  istioManagement:
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
  enableConfigValidation: false
  envoyAccessLogService:
    address: log-service.istio-system
    port: 15006
    tlsSettings:
      sni: log.svc.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: sidecar-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: sidecar~
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: SIDECAR_PROXY
      patch:
        operation: ADD
        value:
          admin:
            accessLogPath: /dev/stdout
            profileDefault: true
            address:
              socketAddress:
                address: 0.0.0.0
                portValue: 15000
